front.title: Kunlun Tech
front.subtitle: A pioneer in Chinese open-source AI and the developer of the Skywork model family.

back.text:
Kunlun Tech is a prominent Chinese technology firm that has transitioned from internet services to a leadership role in artificial intelligence. The company is best known in the AI community for its Skywork series of large language models. These models are designed with a focus on high-quality data processing and efficient scaling, contributing significantly to the global open-weight ecosystem by providing researchers with accessible, high-performance alternatives to proprietary systems.

Beyond model development, Kunlun Tech emphasizes the integration of AI across diverse digital mediums, including search and content generation. Their commitment to open-source principles is demonstrated through the release of the Skywork-13B model and its subsequent iterations, which feature specialized training techniques to enhance reasoning and mathematical capabilities. This approach fosters transparency and collaborative innovation within the international machine learning community.
